series_metadata.series_description: This record serves to document an OSHP Law Enforcement Officer, OSHP Retired Law Enforcement Officer, and OSHP Auxiliary Officer’s weapon qualification records (HP-15, HP-15A, and HP-15C). OSHP retiree’s record of qualification to carry a concealed firearm is in accordance with the Law Enforcement Officer Safety Act of 2004. (H. R. 218)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: original will be retained current year, one year, and ; Electronic: original will be retained current year, one year, and
